mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `match` (tournament_id, group_stage_id, `name`, team1_id, team2_id, team1_score, team2_score, status, stage, match_time, location) VALUES (#{tournamentId}, #{groupStageId}, #{name}, #{team1Id}, #{team2Id}, #{team1Score}, #{team2Score}, #{status}, #{stage}, #{matchTime}, #{location})

INSERT INTO `match` (tournament_id, group_stage_id, `name`, team1_id, team2_id, team1_score, team2_score, status, stage, match_time, location) VALUES
(#{match.tournamentId}, #{match.groupStageId}, #{match.name}, #{match.team1Id}, #{match.team2Id}, #{match.team1Score}, #{match.team2Score}, #{match.status}, #{match.stage}, #{match.matchTime}, #{match.location})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM `match` WHERE tournament_id = #{tournamentId} ORDER BY match_time ASC, id ASC
SELECT * FROM `match` WHERE team1_id = #{teamId} OR team2_id = #{teamId} ORDER BY match_time ASC, id ASC
SELECT * FROM `match` WHERE group_stage_id = #{groupStageId} ORDER BY match_time ASC, id ASC
